children.text: Similarities & Differences
children.cn: 外貌与性格

children.text: My best friend is Tom, and we are in the same class.
children.cn: 我的好朋友是汤姆，我们在同一个班级。
children.notes: best friend: 好朋友; same class: 同一个班级
children.statement: 作者和汤姆不在同一个班级。
children.explanation: 句子中提到“we are in the same class”（我们在同一个班级）。

children.text: We look a bit different because he is taller than me.
children.cn: 我们看起来有点不同，因为他比我高。
children.notes: look a bit different: 看起来有一点不同; taller than: 比……高; because: 因为
children.statement: “taller” 是形容词 “tall” 的比较级形式。
children.explanation: 形容词 tall 的比较级是直接加 -er，变为 taller，表示“更高”。

children.text: I am quiet, but he is more outgoing than me.
children.cn: 我很安静，但他比我更外向。
children.notes: quiet: 安静的; outgoing: 外向的; more outgoing: 更外向的（outgoing是多音节形容词，其比较级前加more）
children.statement: “outgoing” 的比较级是在词尾直接加 -er。
children.explanation: outgoing 是多音节形容词，它的比较级必须在前面加 more，即 more outgoing，而不是在词尾加 -er。

children.text: School & Hobbies
children.cn: 学习与爱好

children.text: We also have different hobbies because he likes playing soccer.
children.cn: 我们也有不同的爱好，因为他喜欢踢足球。
children.notes: different hobbies: 不同的爱好; playing soccer: 踢足球
children.statement: 汤姆最喜欢的活动是踢足球。
children.explanation: 句子中明确说明汤姆喜欢踢足球（likes playing soccer）。

children.text: He works harder than me at school and always gets good grades.
children.cn: 他在学校里学习比我更努力，并且总是取得好成绩。
children.notes: works harder: 学习更努力; at school: 在学校; good grades: 好成绩
children.statement: 汤姆在学校学习没有作者努力。
children.explanation: 句子中写到“He works harder than me”（他学习比我更努力）。
children.keywords: works harder, school, always, good grades

children.text: Learning from Him
children.cn: 向他学习

children.text: I want to learn from him because he is very helpful to others.
children.cn: 我想向他学习，因为他对别人非常有帮助。
children.notes: learn from: 向……学习; helpful to others: 对他人有帮助/乐于助人
children.statement: “helpful” 是由名词 “help” 加形容词后缀 “-ful” 构成的。
children.explanation: help 是名词（帮助），加上形容词后缀 -ful 变为 helpful（有帮助的，乐于助人的）。

children.text: I believe that we will always be good friends.
children.cn: 我相信我们将一直是好朋友。
children.notes: believe: 相信; good friends: 好朋友
children.statement: 作者觉得他们未来很难继续当好朋友。
children.explanation: 作者明确表达“I believe that we will always be good friends”（我相信我们将一直是好朋友）。

children.text: Similarities & Differences
children.cn: 外貌与性格

children.text: My best friend is Tom, who is a smart classmate of mine.
children.cn: 我的好朋友是汤姆，他是我的一位聪明班友。
children.notes: who...: 关系代词who引导的非限制性定语从句，修饰 Tom; classmate of mine: 双重所有格，意为“我的一个同班同学”
children.statement: 句中的 'who' 引导定语从句，修饰前面的先行词 'Tom'。
children.explanation: who 在此句中引导定语从句，并在从句中作主语，修饰前面的主语 Tom。
children.keywords: best friend, Tom, who, classmate, mine

children.text: Although we get along well, we look quite different because he is much taller than me.
children.cn: 虽然我们相处得很好，但我们看起来相当不同，因为他比我高得多。
children.notes: Although: 虽然; get along well: 相处得好; much taller: 高得多（much修饰比较级）
children.statement: “get along well” 意为“相处得好/相处融洽”。
children.explanation: get along well with sb. 是固定搭配，意为与某人相处融洽，此处作插入从句。
children.keywords: Although, get along well, look, different, much taller

children.text: Furthermore, while I am relatively quiet and shy, he is far more outgoing and popular.
children.cn: 此外，虽然我相对安静和害羞，但他要外向和受欢迎得多。
children.notes: Furthermore: 此外，而且; while: 虽然，然而（表对比/让步）; far more outgoing: 外向得多; popular: 受欢迎的
children.statement: 这里的 “while” 意为“当……的时候”。
children.explanation: 这里的 “while” 是连词，表示对比或让步，翻译为“虽然”或“然而”，并不是指时间。
children.keywords: Furthermore, while, quiet, far more outgoing, popular

children.text: School & Hobbies
children.cn: 学习与爱好

children.text: Regarding our hobbies, I enjoy reading books at home, whereas he prefers playing soccer on the playground.
children.cn: 关于我们的爱好，我喜欢在家里看书，而他更喜欢在操场上踢足球。
children.notes: Regarding: 关于，至于; whereas: 然而，而（表强烈对比）; prefers: 更喜欢; playground: 操场
children.statement: “prefer” 后面常常接动词的过去分词形式形式。
children.explanation: prefer 后常接动词不定式（prefer to do）或动名词形式（prefer doing），这里 prefer playing soccer 是动名词形式。
children.keywords: Regarding, hobbies, reading, whereas, prefers, soccer

children.text: When it comes to study, he works much harder than me, which helps him get excellent grades.
children.cn: 说到学习，他比我努力得多，这帮助他取得了优秀的成绩。
children.notes: When it comes to: 当提到/谈到某事; much harder: 努力得多; which...: 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰前面整句话; excellent grades: 优秀的成绩
children.statement: “When it comes to” 中的 “to” 是动词不定式符号，后面必须接动词原形。
children.explanation: “When it comes to” 中的 “to” 是介词，后面应该接名词、代词或动名词（这里接名词 study）。
children.keywords: comes to study, works harder, which helps, excellent grades

children.text: Learning from Him
children.cn: 向他学习

children.text: I really want to learn from his shining points, especially his helpfulness and optimistic attitude toward life.
children.cn: 我真的想学习他的闪光点，尤其是他的热心和对生活的乐观态度。
children.notes: shining points: 闪光点; helpfulness: 乐于助人，热心（help 的名词派生词）; optimistic: 乐观的; attitude toward: 对……的态度
children.statement: “helpfulness” 是名词，由形容词 “helpful” 加上名词后缀 “-ness” 构成。
children.explanation: 形容词后加后缀 -ness 可以转化成名词，helpfulness 表示“乐于助人的品质”。
children.keywords: learn from, shining points, especially, helpfulness, optimistic attitude

children.text: By learning from each other, I believe we can make progress together and remain friends forever.
children.cn: 通过互相学习，我相信我们可以一起取得进步，并永远保持朋友关系。
children.notes: By doing: 通过……方式; learn from each other: 互相学习; make progress: 取得进步; remain friends: 保持朋友关系; forever: 永远
children.statement: “By learning” 中的 “by” 引导介词短语在句中作方式状语。
children.explanation: “by + 动名词”结构常用作方式状语，意为“通过……的方式”。
children.keywords: By learning, believe, make progress, remain friends, forever
